obs.answerLabel: Has patient walked in or came willingly

div.label: Have you ever had any operation before?

span.label: When did you last see your monthly period?

How many modern bottles per day?

td.label: Based on the Patient current condition, can the Patient work for an income?

td.span:

tr.td:
